Helper Function to generate merged counts within the plus minus range provided

Source: R/PlottingSpaMTP.R
plot_plus_minus.Rd

Helper Function to generate merged counts within the plus minus range provided

Usage

plot_plus_minus(object, mz_list, plusminus)

Arguments

object

Seurat Spatial Metabolomic object containing mz values.

mz_list

Vector of numeric m/z values to plot (e.g. c(mz-400.1578, mz-300.1)).

plusminus

Numeric value defining the range/threshold either side of each mz peak provided.

Value

List contatining a Seurat data object which contains the binned counts in the @metadata slot, the column name under where the data is stored and the title of this binned which will be plotted.

Examples

### HELPER FUNCTION ###
